## Runtime.Session.ConfectionEditingSession.saveAsNewConfection() method

Saves as an entirely new confection with new ID. Use when collection is immutable or creating a derivative confection.

**Signature:**

```typescript
saveAsNewConfection(options: ISaveNewConfectionOptions): Result<ISaveResult>;
```
